description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Levi's ups the ante of classic-yet-casual elegance with this T-shirt that Sports the brand logo on the front. Tailored to a beautiful finish, this tee is designed to Fit snugly and flaunt your chiseled body. Slip into a pair of black jeans and sneakers to complement this T-shirt. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
